versions.changelog: Initial public release. Tri-Cities, WA (Kennewick-Pasco-Richland) map built from US Census LODES 2022 tract-level origin-destination commute data (333 demand points, 328,405 residents, 328,405 jobs, 6,451 commute OD pairs; DEMAND_FACTOR=5). Special demand for Tri-Cities Airport (PSC; 2,700 daily pax), three universities (WSU Tri-Cities, Columbia Basin College, Heritage University-TC), and TRAC event center. Includes 43,822-entry buildings collision index, PSC runway+taxiway layer, and multi-scale labels (3 cities, 8 suburbs, 25 neighborhoods) via OpenStreetMap Overpass API place nodes.
